items.title: Pro Git book — chapters 1 & 3
items.note: The canonical free Git book; chapter 1 covers basics, chapter 3 covers branching internals.

items.title: Git internals — objects, refs and packfiles
items.note: Demystifies what a commit, tree and blob actually are on disk.

items.title: Git Reference — switch / restore
items.note: The modern split of `checkout` into focused commands.

items.title: Conventional Commits
items.note: Optional but popular convention for commit message structure (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`).

items.title: github/gitignore templates
items.note: Battle-tested .gitignore starters for every language and toolchain.
